title: Access media assets securely with IP allowlist restrictions
description: We’re introducing IP allowlist restrictions for media asset domains. Only IP addresses on your organization’s allowlist will be able to access media assets (attachments, images, and videos) hosted on media-cdn.atlassian.com and api.media.atlassian.com. If you use third-party security tools like Zscaler, make sure to allowlist [Source IP Anchoring|https://help.zscaler.com/zia/understanding-source-ip-anchoring] *.atlassian.com to avoid disruptions. The cache invalidation takes effect 29 days after
